$schema: Documents the browser-agent execution loop as an explicit task-graph/state-transition contract. This is a REVIEWABLE ARTIFACT, not a file loaded at runtime — the authoritative implementation is the LangGraph StateGraph built in Backend/src/services/brain.py:_execute_tool_graph (nodes: agent/call_model, tools/_call_tool) plus the outer retry loop in Backend/src/services/brain.py:process_message. Keep this in sync with those; do not add a JSON-driven workflow interpreter.
loop: Observe -> Plan -> Execute -> Verify -> Recover -> Complete

Observe.description: Parse the raw tool observation into a structured ObservedState (url, is_loading, has_modal, has_login_form, has_error, error_signals, captcha_type, otp_type).
Observe.runs: once per tool result, immediately after the tool call returns and browser-observation sanitization runs
transitions_to: Verify (after a tool call this turn)

Plan.description: The LLM (browser agent, following browser.agent.md's ReAct-style prompt) reasons over the message history + latest observation and either calls a tool or produces a final answer.

Execute.description: Runs the LLM-selected MCP tool call(s), buffers/broadcasts tool_start and tool_output events to the UI, and logs the real ToolExecutionLog row.

Verify.description: Checks whether the tool call's expected effect occurred, using the tool name/args + the ObservedState from this turn's Observe step. Appends a ValidationResult (INFO/WARNING/BLOCKING) to execution_history and to the graph's validation_result field; on failure, appends a note to the observation the Planner reads next.

Recover.description: On a failure that exhausts in-graph retries (obstacle requiring human input, or the outer retry loop's max_retries), classify the failure and produce a revised strategy or pause for human input.
implementation: src/services/obstacle_handler.py:detect_obstacle_from_observed() + ObstacleInputNeeded -> pauses run, surfaces NEEDS_INPUT form (CAPTCHA/OTP obstacles)
src/services/recovery.py:classify_failure()/format_hint() -> deterministic pre-classification hint for mechanically-detectable failure types
Backend/src/services/ATAG.py:run_critic() -> LLM-driven classification into one of the 11 Recovery Protocol branches (see Backend/src/agents/specs/recovery.md) + revised prompt
Backend/src/services/brain.py retry loop -> resets the browser session with a rotated identity and re-enters Plan with the critic's revised prompt

Complete.description: The LLM produces a final answer with no further tool calls, or the retry budget is exhausted; the run's final_response and execution_history are persisted.
